name: malayalam-panchangam
description: Malayalam Panchangam calculator — compute Nakshatra, Tithi, Yoga, Karana, Rashi, and Kollam Era dates for any given date

scripts.test: node -e "const P = require('./panchang.js'); const r = new P().calculate(new Date()); console.log(r.nakshatra.name ? 'OK' : 'FAIL');"

author: Babu Perumana <babuperumana@gmail.com>
